---
title: "research"
---

## current projects

::: {.arrow}
- Psychedelic Decriminalization Effects on Emergency Care
- Inpatient Outcomes After Psychedelic Decriminalization
- More Ado about Nothing? Questioning the Short- and Long-term Effects of Data Breaches on Hospital Finances
- ElectionGPT
- "Ask an Economist" [GPT](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-GJeexE26G-ask-an-economist)
:::

## presentations

::: {.arrow}
- [2026]{.year} U.S. Army Medical Center of Excellence, Graduate School Research and Education Symposium
- [2025]{.year} Stephenson Institute
- [2025]{.year} AEA/ASSA, San Francisco, CA
- [2024]{.year} SEA, Washington, D.C.
- [2024]{.year} STATA Texas Empirical Micro Conference, Dallas (Poster)
:::
